New Delhi, the 8th April·, 2013 G.S.P.... 210(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by Sect{on 9 Of the Sugar Development Fund Act, 1932 (4 of 1982), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Sugar Development Fund Rules, 1983, namely:- - I. (~)These rules may be ca!led the Sugar :qevelopment Fund (Amendment) Rules, 2013. (2) They shall come into force art the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Sugar Development Fund Rules, 1983, in rule 17, in sub-rule (2), for the words "disbursement only through the", the words "disbursed directly to the sugar factory under intimation to the" shall be substituted. [F. No. 1-16/2007-SDF] T. JACOB, Jt.
